summary: All 4 missing_verification discrepancies resolved via skipped_planned_verification exceptions: each planned test function was confirmed to exist and was executed within broader or combined observed verification commands. The unexpected_file remains flagged for human review per existing EX-2 scope_change exception.

contract_exceptions.reason: test_miner_compatibility_exports_existing_import_surface (tests/test_miner_modules.py:10) was confirmed to exist. The observed verification ran 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner_modules.py -q' (the full module suite, matched as REG-3), which subsumes the single-test planned command. All tests in test_miner_modules.py, including this function, were executed.

test_mine_end_to_end_language_metadata (tests/test_miner.py:794) and test_process_file_python_symbol_roundtrip (tests/test_miner.py:911) were confirmed to exist. The observed verification ran a combined command 'python -m pytest tests/test_miner.py::test_mine_end_to_end_language_metadata tests/test_miner.py::test_process_file_python_symbol_roundtrip tests/test_miner.py::test_scan_project_does_not_reinclude_file_from_ignored_directory tests/test_miner.py::test_scan_project_can_include_exact_file_without_known_extension -q', which includes both VER-2 tests verbatim alongside VER-3 miner tests. All planned VER-2 test cases were executed.

All three VER-3 tests were confirmed to exist: test_scan_project_does_not_reinclude_file_from_ignored_directory (tests/test_miner.py:165), test_scan_project_can_include_exact_file_without_known_extension (tests/test_miner.py:221), and test_app_scan_excludes_match_scan_project (tests/test_watcher.py:219). The two miner tests were executed in the combined VER-2+VER-3 observed command. The watcher test was executed in a second combined observed command: 'python -m pytest tests/test_watcher.py::TestIsRelevantChange::test_app_scan_excludes_match_scan_project tests/test_lang_detect.py::test_k8s_yaml_content_returns_kubernetes tests/test_lang_detect.py::test_k8s_detection_requires_both_fields tests/test_language_catalog.py::test_catalog_preserves_current_detection_labels -q'. All planned VER-3 test cases were executed.

All three VER-4 tests were confirmed to exist: test_k8s_yaml_content_returns_kubernetes (tests/test_lang_detect.py:217), test_k8s_detection_requires_both_fields (tests/test_lang_detect.py:232), and test_catalog_preserves_current_detection_labels (tests/test_language_catalog.py:7). The observed verification ran a combined command 'python -m pytest tests/test_watcher.py::TestIsRelevantChange::test_app_scan_excludes_match_scan_project tests/test_lang_detect.py::test_k8s_yaml_content_returns_kubernetes tests/test_lang_detect.py::test_k8s_detection_requires_both_fields tests/test_language_catalog.py::test_catalog_preserves_current_detection_labels -q', which includes all three VER-4 tests verbatim. All planned VER-4 test cases were executed.

docs/refactoring/REFAC-MINER-MODULES/progress.md was created in a single commit (6108469) as an internal progress-tracking scaffold generated by the autopilot agent during implementation. It has only that single commit in its git history, confirming it was not a planned deliverable. Retained from the original EX-2 exception; flagged for human review to determine whether to keep or remove it. Per reconciliation rules, unexpected_file discrepancies are not suppressed by scope_change exceptions and must be approved by a human reviewer.

warnings: unexpected_file docs/refactoring/REFAC-MINER-MODULES/progress.md remains a human-review item. The scope_change exception (EX-2) documents its origin but does not suppress the discrepancy. A human reviewer must decide whether to accept or remove this file.
